summary: Script quality is solid (type hints, specific exceptions, context managers, clear structure). But deliverable is incomplete: CRITICAL GAPS: (1) NO tests anywhere—task mandates TDD with failing tests first, all tests must pass and run through act; (2) NO test fixtures—task explicitly requires mock commit logs; (3) NO test harness—no logic to run multiple test cases; (4) NO act-result.txt artifact (required). Workflow is basic: just runs script once with hardcoded filenames, doesn't validate outputs or assert expected values, doesn't structure testing as required. Task says 'ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT' and test harness must capture/assert exact outputs—none of this present. Script alone scores 4-5 but solution fails core requirements.
